message:
fix(installers): use portable sed instead of GNU grep -P

The bv and cass installers used `grep -oP` (Perl regex) for extracting
tag_name from GitHub API response. This fails on macOS/BSD where grep
doesn't support the -P flag. Changed to POSIX-compatible sed pattern,
matching the fix already present in ntm installer.

Also fixes SBOM path computation mismatch in sbom_generate_artifacts
to correctly skip existing SBOMs.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -128,11 +128,12 @@ _get_latest_version() {
         return 1
     }
 
-    # Extract tag_name from JSON (works with jq or grep)
+    # Extract tag_name from JSON (works with jq or POSIX tools)
     if command -v jq &>/dev/null; then
         echo "$response" | jq -r '.tag_name'
     else
-        echo "$response" | grep -oP '"tag_name":\s*"\K[^"]+' | head -1
+        # Avoid non-portable grep -P (not available on macOS/BSD)
+        echo "$response" | sed -n 's/.*"tag_name"[[:space:]]*:[[:space:]]*"\([^"]*\)".*/\1/p' | head -1
     fi
 }

@@ -128,11 +128,12 @@ _get_latest_version() {
         return 1
     }
 
-    # Extract tag_name from JSON (works with jq or grep)
+    # Extract tag_name from JSON (works with jq or POSIX tools)
     if command -v jq &>/dev/null; then
         echo "$response" | jq -r '.tag_name'
     else
-        echo "$response" | grep -oP '"tag_name":\s*"\K[^"]+' | head -1
+        # Avoid non-portable grep -P (not available on macOS/BSD)
+        echo "$response" | sed -n 's/.*"tag_name"[[:space:]]*:[[:space:]]*"\([^"]*\)".*/\1/p' | head -1
     fi
 }

@@ -235,8 +235,15 @@ sbom_generate_artifacts() {
                 ;;
         esac
 
-        # Skip if SBOM already exists
-        local sbom_file="${artifact}.sbom.${format%%json}.json"
+        # Skip if SBOM already exists - must match the output path from sbom_generate
+        # sbom_generate uses: ${target%.*}.sbom.$output_ext
+        # where output_ext is "spdx.json" or "cdx.json"
+        local output_ext
+        case "$format" in
+            spdx|spdx-json)   output_ext="spdx.json" ;;
+            cyclonedx|cdx|*)  output_ext="cdx.json" ;;
+        esac
+        local sbom_file="${artifact%.*}.sbom.$output_ext"
         if [[ -f "$sbom_file" ]]; then
             log_debug "SBOM already exists: $sbom_file"
             continue
